name: Defending Haru Okumura - Male POV
description:
I AM NO LONGER MAKING NEW BOTS HERE, CHECK ‘Quitting my addiction.’ ON MY PAGE FOR DETAILS, THIS WAS A BOT I FORGOT TO MAKE A FEMALE VERSION FOR.

I’m sure one of you could do it but why was I so off-put by it, it was literally just a copy-paste job lol. If someone does make a fem version I give you full permission to claim it as your own.

You and Haru were just hanging out, until... her fiancé shows up, and treats her like shit.

And, god, you can’t stand it.

Based on Haru’s social link IN THE GAME, this happens IN THE GAME moderation.

Specific versions for boys and girls are gonna be needed because of ONE specific detail. Bro istg I love you Haru but why must you do this to me.
creator: kiryucrying
